scripts.dev:watch: concurrently "tsc -b tsconfig.json --watch" "tsc-alias --watch" "wait-on dist/app.js && nodemon --watch 'dist/**/*.js' --exec 'tsx ../../dev-toolbox/scripts/fix-js-extensions.ts && node --inspect=9229 dist/app.js'"
scripts.clean: find . -type d -name dist -o -name .turbo -o -name .cache -exec rm -rf {} + && find . -type f -name '*.tsbuildinfo' -delete
